framework.name: A2A + MCP + AP2 Stack
framework.description: Integration architecture where Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables agent tool/data access, Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol handles agent communication, and Agent Payment Protocol (AP2) manages transaction execution. Together these form a potential standard stack for autonomous agent commerce.
framework.raw_quote: agent payment protocol is an extension to our A2A work...there's obviously lots of people are familiar with model context protocol. A2A is a complimentary piece of technology that I think when combined with agent payment protocol and blockchain rails are a really great fit

source.title: From Protocol to Payments: Agentic Commerce and the Universal Ledger | DAS London 2025 | Day 3
